utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Checking the final property solution: (1) property — fully specified with selected property, details, and price; (2) financing — includes solution and full terms (down payment, fees, interest rate, term, monthly payment); (3) legal_services — includes service name and costs; (4) moving_services — includes service level and costs; (5) setup_services — includes utility package type, services included, and costs; (6) total_budget — includes complete cost breakdown with all relevant cost elements. All six items are present and fully detailed according to the required format.
